title: Marvel導演趙婷:  未準備回「中國」拍戲, 因為「西方」比「中國」自由

replies.msg:
仲以為佢會跪, 原來未跪.... 起碼係最新訪問仲未跪.

《浪跡天地》（Nomadland）, Marvel《永恆族》（Eternals）導演趙婷:
- 在「西方」工作, 是一種解放.
- 自己在「西方」拍電影, 感覺受到保護.
- 「西方」比較自由, 至少在精神上是比較自由.
- 反而, 我還未準備回「中國」拍戲, 因為在「中國」拍戲是比較沈重的事.

- 就算我在「中國」居住時, 我也一直夢想要到「西方」居住. (. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west.")

https://twitter.com/THR/status/1371799427384541186
要周圍廣傳呢段訪問先得, 包括twitter, 微博, savehk .....

quote.msg:

- 自己在「西方」拍電影, 感覺受到保護.
- 「西方」比較自由, 至少在精神上是比較自由.
- 反而, 我還未準備回「中國」拍戲, 因為在「中國」拍戲是比較沈重的事.

- 就算我在「中國」居住時, 我也一直夢想要到「西方」居住. (. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west.")

https://twitter.com/THR/status/1371799427384541186

replies.msg:
睇怕今年奧斯卡比中共禁硬.

https://www.rfa.org/cantonese/news/oscar-03162021065336.html

多位大陸官媒工作人員向本台透露，各大傳媒已收到中宣部指令，由於香港民眾反送中紀錄短片《不割席》以及常發表敏感言論的華裔導演趙婷均入選最後5強名單，為堅持政治正確，要求官媒低調處理，選擇不敏感的內容報道，中央電視台亦將取消直播。

《浪跡天地》（Nomadland）, Marvel《永恆族》（Eternals）導演趙婷:

replies.msg:
要周圍廣傳呢段訪問先得, 包括twitter, 微博, savehk .....


訪問相關quote:

Zhao says working in the West is liberating. "I always feel like I’m protected in a way to make films here," she says. "There’s a bit more freedom, at least psychologically, for me. If I were to go back home, make a film in China, there might be heavier things. I’m not ready to go there."
.........
She grew up watching American films on TV — Ghost, Sister Act and The Terminator are among her earliest recollections — and writing fan fiction, which she still does, though she declines to reveal for which properties. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west."

澄清: 呢個係上年9月做既訪問, 美媒只係而家借機貼出黎.
不過, 要周圍廣傳呢段訪問先得, 包括twitter, 微博, savehk .....

訪問相關quote:

Zhao says working in the West is liberating. "I always feel like I’m protected in a way to make films here," she says. "There’s a bit more freedom, at least psychologically, for me. If I were to go back home, make a film in China, there might be heavier things. I’m not ready to go there."
.........
She grew up watching American films on TV — Ghost, Sister Act and The Terminator are among her earliest recollections — and writing fan fiction, which she still does, though she declines to reveal for which properties. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west."

quote.msg: 好期待迪士尼反應
好期待迪士尼反應

- 自己在「西方」拍電影, 感覺受到保護.
- 「西方」比較自由, 至少在精神上是比較自由.
- 反而, 我還未準備回「中國」拍戲, 因為在「中國」拍戲是比較沈重的事.

- 就算我在「中國」居住時, 我也一直夢想要到「西方」居住. (. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west.")

仲以為佢會跪, 原來未跪.... 起碼係最新訪問仲未跪.

《浪跡天地》（Nomadland）, Marvel《永恆族》（Eternals）導演趙婷:
- 在「西方」工作, 是一種解放.
- 自己在「西方」拍電影, 感覺受到保護.
- 「西方」比較自由, 至少在精神上是比較自由.
- 反而, 我還未準備回「中國」拍戲, 因為在「中國」拍戲是比較沈重的事.

- 就算我在「中國」居住時, 我也一直夢想要到「西方」居住. (. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west.")

https://twitter.com/THR/status/1371799427384541186
唔係美籍咩

pinned.msg:
澄清: 呢個係上年9月做既訪問, 美媒只係而家借機貼出黎.
不過, 要周圍廣傳呢段訪問先得, 包括twitter, 微博, savehk .....

訪問相關quote:

Zhao says working in the West is liberating. "I always feel like I’m protected in a way to make films here," she says. "There’s a bit more freedom, at least psychologically, for me. If I were to go back home, make a film in China, there might be heavier things. I’m not ready to go there."
.........
She grew up watching American films on TV — Ghost, Sister Act and The Terminator are among her earliest recollections — and writing fan fiction, which she still does, though she declines to reveal for which properties. "When I was in China, all I read and dreamt about was in the West," says Zhao. "You want to go west, always go west."
